series_metadata.series_description: Reports based on on-site review of state contractors which include statistical analysis of workforce composition, projects, affirmative action efforts, interviews with company personnel and visits to project sites. Used to monitor compliance with State EEO standards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy paper documents after converting to electronic image and uploading into electronic storage system. ; Electronic: Retain electronic image permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
